title: Von Neumann Entropy: Quantum Information Measure
description: Master von Neumann entropy - the fundamental measure of quantum information that generalizes Shannon entropy to the quantum domain.
learningObjectives: Define von Neumann entropy in terms of density matrices
Prove key properties: non-negativity, concavity, subadditivity
Understand the relationship between purity and entropy
Apply von Neumann entropy to quantum state analysis
Connect von Neumann entropy to thermodynamic entropy
